overall.description: A static shot of a circular gothic-style divination classroom from a video game, featuring stone walls, red velvet curtains, and glowing crystal orbs on wooden tables. A character in dark robes stands near the left wall while another character enters from the right, walks across the central rug, and exits. The warm candlelit atmosphere and detailed medieval architecture indicate high-quality game engine footage.

character walks back toward the right and exits the frame

segments.scene_description: A static view of a circular gothic classroom with stone walls and red curtains. A figure in dark robes stands on the left while another character enters from the right, walks across the central rug past the divination table, turns near the left wall, and exits. The room is illuminated by warm candlelight and glowing crystal orbs placed on wooden tables throughout the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static perspective of a gothic divination classroom as a solitary figure traverses the candlelit space. It begins with a wide view of the circular room, where stone walls and red velvet curtains frame a figure in dark robes standing still on the left. As the scene unfolds, another character enters from the right and walks across the central rug, passing by wooden tables adorned with glowing crystal orbs. The movement continues as the character turns near the left wall before finally exiting the frame, leaving the room to its warm, flickering illumination.
